# example-full

Full EXAMPLE.yaml CR→CM→CR→CM with CEL validation, strict decode, and golden ConfigMaps

!!! tip "Direction: `to-roundtrip`"

| | |
| --- | --- |
| Direction | `to-roundtrip` |
| Path | `testdata/cases/roundtrip/example-full` |
| CR name | `argocd-config` |
| Namespace | `argocd` |

## Input

### `configuration.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: ArgoCDConfiguration
metadata:
  name: argocd-config
  namespace: argocd
spec:
  applicationNamespaceGlobs:
  - team-*
  applicationSet:
    allowedSCMProviderURLs:
    - https://example.com
    dryRun: true
    gitHubAPIMetricsEnabled: true
    gitSubmoduleEnabled: true
    globalPreserved:
      annotationKeys:
      - app.kubernetes.io/name
      labelKeys:
      - app.kubernetes.io/name
    grpcTXTServiceConfigEnabled: true
    k8sClient:
      burst: 100
      maxIdleConnections: 50
      qps: "50"
      retry:
        backoff:
          duration: 1h0m0s
          factor: 2
          maxDuration: 1h0m0s
        max: 5
      tcp:
        idleTimeout: 1h0m0s
        keepAlive: 1h0m0s
        timeout: 1h0m0s
      tlsHandshakeTimeout: 1h0m0s
    leaderElectionEnabled: true
    log:
      format: json
      level: info
    metrics:
      address: 0.0.0.0:8083
      applicationSetLabels:
      - app.kubernetes.io/name
    namespaceGlobs:
    - team-*
    newGitFileGlobbingEnabled: true
    policy: sync
    policyOverrideEnabled: true
    probeAddr: :8082
    profileEnabled: true
    progressiveSyncs:
      enabled: true
    reconciliationsParallelismLimit: 10
    repoServerClient:
      caCertPath: /etc/argocd/tls/ca.crt
      clientCertKeyPath: /etc/argocd/tls/tls.key
      clientCertPath: /etc/argocd/tls/tls.crt
    requeueAfter: 1h0m0s
    scmProvidersEnabled: true
    scmRootCAPath: /etc/argocd/tls/ca.crt
    statusMaxResourcesCount: 100
    tokenRefStrictModeEnabled: true
    webhookAddr: :7000
    webhookParallelismLimit: 10
  cluster:
    inClusterEnabled: true
  commitServer:
    address: argocd-commit-server:8086
    commit:
      author:
        email: argo-cd@example.com
        name: Argo CD
    grpcTXTServiceConfigEnabled: true
    listen:
      address: argocd-commit-server:8086
      metricsAddress: 0.0.0.0:8083
    log:
      format: json
      level: info
  controller:
    allowedNodeLabelKeys:
    - app.kubernetes.io/name
    cache:
      appStateExpiration: 1h0m0s
      defaultExpiration: 1h0m0s
    clusterCache:
      batchEventsProcessing: true
      eventsProcessingInterval: 1h0m0s
    diff:
      compareOptions:
        ignoreAggregatedRoles: true
        ignoreDifferencesOnResourceUpdates: true
        ignoreResourceStatusField: crd
      ignoreNormalizerJQTimeout: 1h0m0s
      ignoreResourceUpdatesEnabled: true
      serverSide:
        enabled: true
    globalProjects:
    - labelSelector:
        matchExpressions:
        - key: app.kubernetes.io/name
          operator: In
          values:
          - frontend
        matchLabels:
          app.kubernetes.io/part-of: argocd
      projectName: global
    grpcTXTServiceConfigEnabled: true
    instanceLabelKey: app.kubernetes.io/instance
    k8sClient:
      burst: 100
      maxIdleConnections: 50
      qps: "50"
      retry:
        backoff:
          duration: 1h0m0s
          factor: 2
          maxDuration: 1h0m0s
        max: 5
      tcp:
        idleTimeout: 1h0m0s
        keepAlive: 1h0m0s
        timeout: 1h0m0s
      tlsHandshakeTimeout: 1h0m0s
    kubectlParallelismLimit: 10
    log:
      format: json
      level: info
    metrics:
      application:
        conditions:
        - Synced
        labelKeys:
        - app.kubernetes.io/name
      cacheExpiration: 1h0m0s
      cluster:
        labelKeys:
        - app.kubernetes.io/name
    processors:
      hydration: 20
      operation: 20
      status: 20
    profileEnabled: true
    profilerFilePath: /tmp/argocd-profile.pprof
    reconciliation:
      hardTimeout: 1h0m0s
      jitter: 1h0m0s
      timeout: 1h0m0s
    repoErrorGracePeriod: 1h0m0s
    resource:
      actions:
      - definitions:
        - actionLua: |-
            obj.spec.replicas = 0
            return obj
          name: restart
        discoveryLua: |-
          actions = {}
          actions["restart"] = {}
          return actions
        group: apps
        kind: Deployment
        mergeBuiltinActions: true
      customLabelKeys:
      - app.kubernetes.io/name
      eventLabels:
        excludeKeyGlobs:
        - kubectl.kubernetes.io/*
        includeKeyGlobs:
        - app.kubernetes.io/*
      exclusions:
      - apiGroups:
        - apps
        clusters:
        - https://kubernetes.default.svc
        kinds:
        - Deployment
      health:
      - group: apps
        healthLua: |-
          hs = {}
          hs.status = "Healthy"
          hs.message = "ok"
          return hs
        kind: Deployment
        useOpenLibs: true
      ignoreDifferences:
      - group: apps
        jqPathExpressions:
        - .metadata.annotations."kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration"
        jsonPointers:
        - /status
        kind: Deployment
        managedFieldsManagers:
        - kube-controller-manager
      ignoreResourceUpdates:
      - group: apps
        jqPathExpressions:
        - .metadata.annotations."kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration"
        jsonPointers:
        - /status
        kind: Deployment
        managedFieldsManagers:
        - kube-controller-manager
      inclusions:
      - apiGroups:
        - apps
        clusters:
        - https://kubernetes.default.svc
        kinds:
        - Deployment
      knownTypeFields:
      - fields:
        - field: spec.template
          type: core/v1/PodSpec
        group: apps
        kind: Deployment
      respectRBAC: strict
      sensitiveMaskAnnotationKeys:
      - app.kubernetes.io/name
    resourceHealthPersist: true
    resourceTrackingMethod: annotation
    selfHeal:
      backoff:
        duration: 1h0m0s
        factor: 2
        maxDuration: 1h0m0s
      cooldown: 1h0m0s
      timeout: 1h0m0s
    sharding:
      algorithm: legacy
    sourceHydrator:
      commitMessageTemplate: |-
        chore: hydrate {{.metadata.name}}

        {{range .spec.sources}}{{.repoURL}}@{{.targetRevision}}
        {{end}}
      enabled: true
      readmeMessageTemplate: |-
        # {{.metadata.name}}

        Hydrated by Argo CD source hydrator.
    sync:
      impersonation:
        mode: optional
      requireOverridePrivilegeForRevisionSync: true
      timeout: 1h0m0s
      wave:
        delay: 1h0m0s
  dexServer:
    connectorFailureContinue: true
    log:
      format: json
      level: info
    tlsEnabled: true
  execTimeout: 1h0m0s
  installationID: prod-us-west-1
  logging:
    formatTimestamp: RFC3339
  notifications:
    appLabelSelector: app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argocd
    configMapName: argocd-notifications-cm
    log:
      format: json
      level: info
    metricsPort: 8083
    processorsCount: 20
    repoServerAddress: argocd-repo-server:8081
    repoServerClient:
      caCertPath: /etc/argocd/tls/ca.crt
      clientCertKeyPath: /etc/argocd/tls/tls.key
      clientCertPath: /etc/argocd/tls/tls.crt
    repoServerStrictTLS: true
    secretName: argocd-notifications-secret
    selfServiceEnabled: true
    tlsEnabled: true
  otlp:
    address: otel-collector:4317
    attrs:
      service.name: argocd-server
    headers:
      Authorization: Bearer token
    sampleRatio: "0.5"
    tlsEnabled: true
  redis:
    compression: gzip
    db: 0
    keyPrefix: argocd
    sentinel:
      hosts:
      - redis-sentinel:26379
      master: mymaster
    server: argocd-redis:6379
  repoServer:
    address: argocd-repo-server:8081
    allowOOBSymlinks: true
    cache:
      defaultExpiration: 1h0m0s
      repoExpiration: 1h0m0s
    client:
      insecureSkipVerify: true
      mtls:
        caCertPath: /etc/argocd/tls/ca.crt
        clientCertKeyPath: /etc/argocd/tls/tls.key
        clientCertPath: /etc/argocd/tls/tls.crt
      timeout: 1h0m0s
      tlsEnabled: true
    clientCAPath: /etc/argocd/tls/ca.crt
    git:
      builtinConfigEnabled: true
      lsRemoteParallelismLimit: 10
      requestTimeout: 1h0m0s
      submoduleEnabled: true
    grpcMaxSize: 10Mi
    grpcTXTServiceConfigEnabled: true
    helm:
      enabled: true
      manifest:
        maxExtractedSize: 10M
        maxExtractedSizeEnabled: true
      userAgent: argocd-repo-server
      valuesFileSchemes:
      - https
    includeHiddenDirectories: true
    jsonnet:
      enabled: true
    kustomize:
      buildOptions: --enable-helm --load-restrictor LoadRestrictionsNone
      enabled: true
      versions:
      - buildOptions: --enable-helm --load-restrictor LoadRestrictionsNone
        name: v5.0.0
        path: /usr/local/bin/kustomize
    listen:
      address: argocd-repo-server:8081
      metricsAddress: 0.0.0.0:8083
    log:
      format: json
      level: info
    maxCombinedDirectoryManifestsSize: 10M
    oci:
      layerMediaTypes:
      - application/vnd.oci.image.layer.v1.tar+gzip
      manifest:
        maxExtractedSize: 10M
        maxExtractedSizeEnabled: true
    parallelismLimit: 10
    plugin:
      tarExclusionGlobs:
      - .git/*
      useManifestGeneratePaths: true
    profileEnabled: true
    revisionCacheLockTimeout: 1h0m0s
    streamedManifest:
      maxExtractedSize: 10M
      maxTarSize: 10M
    tls:
      ciphers:
      - TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_128_GCM_SHA256
      maxVersion: "1.3"
      minVersion: "1.2"
    tlsEnabled: true
  server:
    accounts:
    - capabilities:
      - login
      enabled: true
      name: admin
    apiContentTypes:
    - application/json
    applicationTreeShardSize: 100
    authEnabled: true
    baseHref: /argo-cd
    cache:
      appStateExpiration: 1h0m0s
      connectionStatusExpiration: 1h0m0s
      defaultExpiration: 1h0m0s
      globCacheSize: 1000
      oidcExpiration: 1h0m0s
    compression: gzip
    contentSecurityPolicy: frame-ancestors 'self'; object-src 'none'
    deepLinks:
      application:
      - conditionExpr: app.status.sync.status == 'Synced'
        description: Application metrics dashboard
        iconClass: fa-external-link
        title: Open in Grafana
        urlTemplate: https://grafana.example.com/d/argo/{{.app.metadata.name}}
      project:
      - conditionExpr: app.status.sync.status == 'Synced'
        description: Application metrics dashboard
        iconClass: fa-external-link
        title: Open in Grafana
        urlTemplate: https://grafana.example.com/d/argo/{{.app.metadata.name}}
      resource:
      - conditionExpr: app.status.sync.status == 'Synced'
        description: Application metrics dashboard
        iconClass: fa-external-link
        title: Open in Grafana
        urlTemplate: https://grafana.example.com/d/argo/{{.app.metadata.name}}
    dex:
      connectors:
      - config:
          example: true
        id: github
        name: GitHub
        type: github
      extra:
        example: true
      staticClients:
      - example: true
    dexConnection:
      address: argocd-dex-server:5556
      insecureSkipVerify: true
      tlsEnabled: true
    exec:
      enabled: true
      shells:
      - bash
    extensions:
    - connectionTimeout: 1h0m0s
      idleConnectionTimeout: 1h0m0s
      keepAlive: 1h0m0s
      maxIdleConnections: 50
      name: metrics
      services:
      - cluster:
          name: metrics
          serverURL: https://example.com
        headers:
        - name: Authorization
          value: $extension.metrics.token
        url: https://example.com
    googleAnalytics:
      anonymizeUsers: true
      trackingID: UA-123456-1
    grpcTXTServiceConfigEnabled: true
    help:
      binaryURLs:
        darwin-arm64: https://example.com/argocd-darwin-arm64
      chat:
        text: Chat with us on Slack
        url: https://example.com
    httpCookieMaxNumber: 10
    k8sClient:
      burst: 100
      maxIdleConnections: 50
      qps: "50"
      retry:
        backoff:
          duration: 1h0m0s
          factor: 2
          maxDuration: 1h0m0s
        max: 5
      tcp:
        idleTimeout: 1h0m0s
        keepAlive: 1h0m0s
        timeout: 1h0m0s
      tlsHandshakeTimeout: 1h0m0s
    listen:
      address: 0.0.0.0:8080
      metricsAddress: 0.0.0.0:8083
      metricsPort: 8083
      port: 8080
    log:
      format: json
      level: info
    logs:
      maxPodsToRender: 10
    oidc:
      allowedAudiences:
      - argocd
      azure:
        graphAPIEndpointURL: https://example.com
        useWorkloadIdentity: true
        userGroupOverageClaim:
          cacheExpiration: 1h0m0s
          enabled: true
      cliClientID: argocd
      clientID: argocd
      clientSecretRef:
        key: oidc.clientSecret
        name: argocd-secret
        optional: true
      domainHint: contoso.onmicrosoft.com
      insecureSkipVerify: true
      issuerURL: https://example.com
      logoutURL: https://example.com
      name: Okta
      pkceAuthenticationEnabled: true
      refreshTokenThreshold: 1h0m0s
      requestedIDTokenClaims:
        groups:
          essential: true
          value: admin
          values:
          - frontend
      requestedScopes:
      - openid
      rootCA: |-
        -----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----
        MIIB...
        -----END CERTIFICATE-----
      skipAudienceCheckWhenTokenHasNoAudience: true
      userInfo:
        baseURL: https://example.com
        cacheExpiration: 1h0m0s
        groupsEnabled: true
        path: /userinfo
    profileEnabled: true
    proxyExtensionEnabled: true
    rbac:
      applicationFineGrainedInheritanceEnabled: true
      default: role:readonly
      matchMode: glob
      policyCSV: p, role:org-admin, applications, *, */*, allow
      policyOverlays:
      - csv: p, role:org-admin, applications, *, */*, allow
        name: extra
      scopes:
      - groups
    rootPath: /argo-cd
    staticAssetsPath: /shared/app
    statusBadge:
      enabled: true
      url: https://example.com
    syncReplaceAllowed: true
    tls:
      ciphers:
      - TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_128_GCM_SHA256
      maxVersion: "1.3"
      minVersion: "1.2"
    tlsEnabled: true
    ui:
      banner:
        content: Scheduled maintenance Sunday 02:00–04:00 UTC
        permanent: true
        position: top
        url: https://example.com
      cssURL: /shared/app/custom.css
      loginButtonText: Log in via SSO
    urls:
    - https://example.com
    users:
      anonymousEnabled: true
      passwordRegex: ^.{8,32}$
      sessionDuration: 1h0m0s
    webhook:
      maxPayloadSize: 10M
      parallelismLimit: 10
      refresh:
        jitter: 1h0m0s
        jitterThreshold: 3
        workers: 20
    xFrameOptions: sameorigin
```

## Expected ArgoCDConfiguration

### `configuration.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: ArgoCDConfiguration
metadata:
  name: argocd-config
  namespace: argocd
spec:
  applicationNamespaceGlobs:
  - team-*
  applicationSet:
    allowedSCMProviderURLs:
    - https://example.com
    dryRun: true
    gitHubAPIMetricsEnabled: true
    gitSubmoduleEnabled: true
    globalPreserved:
      annotationKeys:
      - app.kubernetes.io/name
      labelKeys:
      - app.kubernetes.io/name
    grpcTXTServiceConfigEnabled: true
    k8sClient:
      burst: 100
      maxIdleConnections: 50
      qps: "50"
      retry:
        backoff:
          duration: 1h0m0s
        max: 5
      tcp:
        idleTimeout: 1h0m0s
        keepAlive: 1h0m0s
        timeout: 1h0m0s
      tlsHandshakeTimeout: 1h0m0s
    leaderElectionEnabled: true
    log:
      format: json
      level: info
    namespaceGlobs:
    - team-*
    newGitFileGlobbingEnabled: true
    policy: sync
    policyOverrideEnabled: true
    profileEnabled: true
    progressiveSyncs:
      enabled: true
    reconciliationsParallelismLimit: 10
    repoServerClient:
      caCertPath: /etc/argocd/tls/ca.crt
      clientCertKeyPath: /etc/argocd/tls/tls.key
      clientCertPath: /etc/argocd/tls/tls.crt
    requeueAfter: 1h0m0s
    scmProvidersEnabled: true
    scmRootCAPath: /etc/argocd/tls/ca.crt
    statusMaxResourcesCount: 100
    tokenRefStrictModeEnabled: true
    webhookParallelismLimit: 10
  cluster:
    inClusterEnabled: true
  commitServer:
    address: argocd-commit-server:8086
    commit:
      author:
        email: argo-cd@example.com
        name: Argo CD
    grpcTXTServiceConfigEnabled: true
    listen:
      address: argocd-commit-server:8086
      metricsAddress: 0.0.0.0:8083
    log:
      format: json
      level: info
  controller:
    allowedNodeLabelKeys:
    - app.kubernetes.io/name
    cache:
      appStateExpiration: 1h0m0s
      defaultExpiration: 1h0m0s
    clusterCache:
      batchEventsProcessing: true
      eventsProcessingInterval: 1h0m0s
    diff:
      compareOptions:
        ignoreAggregatedRoles: true
        ignoreDifferencesOnResourceUpdates: true
        ignoreResourceStatusField: crd
      ignoreNormalizerJQTimeout: 1h0m0s
      ignoreResourceUpdatesEnabled: true
      serverSide:
        enabled: true
    globalProjects:
    - labelSelector:
        matchExpressions:
        - key: app.kubernetes.io/name
          operator: In
          values:
          - frontend
        matchLabels:
          app.kubernetes.io/part-of: argocd
      projectName: global
    grpcTXTServiceConfigEnabled: true
    instanceLabelKey: app.kubernetes.io/instance
    k8sClient:
      burst: 100
      maxIdleConnections: 50
      qps: "50"
      retry:
        backoff:
          duration: 1h0m0s
        max: 5
      tcp:
        idleTimeout: 1h0m0s
        keepAlive: 1h0m0s
        timeout: 1h0m0s
      tlsHandshakeTimeout: 1h0m0s
    kubectlParallelismLimit: 10
    log:
      format: json
      level: info
    metrics:
      application:
        conditions:
        - Synced
        labelKeys:
        - app.kubernetes.io/name
      cacheExpiration: 1h0m0s
      cluster:
        labelKeys:
        - app.kubernetes.io/name
    processors:
      hydration: 20
      operation: 20
      status: 20
    profileEnabled: true
    reconciliation:
      hardTimeout: 1h0m0s
      jitter: 1h0m0s
      timeout: 1h0m0s
    repoErrorGracePeriod: 1h0m0s
    resource:
      actions:
      - definitions:
        - actionLua: |-
            obj.spec.replicas = 0
            return obj
          name: restart
        discoveryLua: |-
          actions = {}
          actions["restart"] = {}
          return actions
        group: apps
        kind: Deployment
        mergeBuiltinActions: true
      customLabelKeys:
      - app.kubernetes.io/name
      eventLabels:
        excludeKeyGlobs:
        - kubectl.kubernetes.io/*
        includeKeyGlobs:
        - app.kubernetes.io/*
      exclusions:
      - apiGroups:
        - apps
        clusters:
        - https://kubernetes.default.svc
        kinds:
        - Deployment
      health:
      - group: apps
        healthLua: |-
          hs = {}
          hs.status = "Healthy"
          hs.message = "ok"
          return hs
        kind: Deployment
        useOpenLibs: true
      ignoreDifferences:
      - group: apps
        jqPathExpressions:
        - .metadata.annotations."kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration"
        jsonPointers:
        - /status
        kind: Deployment
        managedFieldsManagers:
        - kube-controller-manager
      ignoreResourceUpdates:
      - group: apps

      - fields:
        - field: spec.template
          type: core/v1/PodSpec
        group: apps
        kind: Deployment
      respectRBAC: strict
      sensitiveMaskAnnotationKeys:
      - app.kubernetes.io/name
    resourceHealthPersist: true
    resourceTrackingMethod: annotation
    selfHeal:
      backoff:
        duration: 1h0m0s
        factor: 2
        maxDuration: 1h0m0s
      cooldown: 1h0m0s

        chore: hydrate {{.metadata.name}}

        {{end}}
      enabled: true

    sync:
      impersonation:
        mode: optional
      requireOverridePrivilegeForRevisionSync: true
      timeout: 1h0m0s
      wave:
        delay: 1h0m0s

    connectorFailureContinue: true

    repoServerClient:

    client:

      timeout: 1h0m0s
      tlsEnabled: true
    clientCAPath: /etc/argocd/tls/ca.crt
    git:
      builtinConfigEnabled: true
      lsRemoteParallelismLimit: 10
      requestTimeout: 1h0m0s
      submoduleEnabled: true
    grpcMaxSize: 10Mi
    grpcTXTServiceConfigEnabled: true
    helm:
      enabled: true
      manifest:
        maxExtractedSize: 10M
        maxExtractedSizeEnabled: true
      userAgent: argocd-repo-server
      valuesFileSchemes:
      - https
    includeHiddenDirectories: true
    jsonnet:
      enabled: true
    kustomize:
      buildOptions: --enable-helm --load-restrictor LoadRestrictionsNone
      enabled: true
      versions:
      - buildOptions: --enable-helm --load-restrictor LoadRestrictionsNone
        name: v5.0.0
        path: /usr/local/bin/kustomize
    listen:
      address: argocd-repo-server:8081
      metricsAddress: 0.0.0.0:8083
    log:
      format: json
      level: info
    maxCombinedDirectoryManifestsSize: 10M
    oci:
      layerMediaTypes:
      - application/vnd.oci.image.layer.v1.tar+gzip
      manifest:
        maxExtractedSize: 10M
        maxExtractedSizeEnabled: true
    parallelismLimit: 10
    plugin:
      tarExclusionGlobs:
      - .git/*
      useManifestGeneratePaths: true
    profileEnabled: true
    revisionCacheLockTimeout: 1h0m0s
    streamedManifest:
      maxExtractedSize: 10M
      maxTarSize: 10M
    tls:
      ciphers:
      - TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_128_GCM_SHA256
      maxVersion: "1.3"
      minVersion: "1.2"
    tlsEnabled: true
  server:
    accounts:
    - enabled: true
      name: admin
    apiContentTypes:
    - application/json
    authEnabled: true
    baseHref: /argo-cd
    cache:
      appStateExpiration: 1h0m0s
      connectionStatusExpiration: 1h0m0s
      defaultExpiration: 1h0m0s
      globCacheSize: 1000
      oidcExpiration: 1h0m0s
    compression: gzip
    contentSecurityPolicy: frame-ancestors 'self'; object-src 'none'
    deepLinks:
      application:
      - conditionExpr: app.status.sync.status == 'Synced'
        description: Application metrics dashboard
        iconClass: fa-external-link
        title: Open in Grafana
        urlTemplate: https://grafana.example.com/d/argo/{{.app.metadata.name}}
      project:
      - conditionExpr: app.status.sync.status == 'Synced'
        description: Application metrics dashboard
        iconClass: fa-external-link
        title: Open in Grafana
        urlTemplate: https://grafana.example.com/d/argo/{{.app.metadata.name}}
      resource:
      - conditionExpr: app.status.sync.status == 'Synced'
        description: Application metrics dashboard
        iconClass: fa-external-link
        title: Open in Grafana
        urlTemplate: https://grafana.example.com/d/argo/{{.app.metadata.name}}
    dex:
      connectors:
      - config:
          example: true
        id: github
        name: GitHub
        type: github
      extra:
        example: true
      staticClients:
      - example: true
    dexConnection:
      address: argocd-dex-server:5556
      insecureSkipVerify: true
      tlsEnabled: true
    exec:
      enabled: true
      shells:
      - bash
    extensions:
    - connectionTimeout: 1h0m0s
      idleConnectionTimeout: 1h0m0s
      keepAlive: 1h0m0s
      maxIdleConnections: 50
      name: metrics
      services:
      - cluster:
          name: metrics
          serverURL: https://example.com
        headers:
        - name: Authorization
          value: $extension.metrics.token
        url: https://example.com
    googleAnalytics:
      anonymizeUsers: true
      trackingID: UA-123456-1
    grpcTXTServiceConfigEnabled: true
    help:
      binaryURLs:
        darwin-arm64: https://example.com/argocd-darwin-arm64
      chat:
        text: Chat with us on Slack
        url: https://example.com
    httpCookieMaxNumber: 10
    k8sClient:
      burst: 100
      maxIdleConnections: 50
      qps: "50"
      retry:
        backoff:
          duration: 1h0m0s
        max: 5
      tcp:
        idleTimeout: 1h0m0s
        keepAlive: 1h0m0s
        timeout: 1h0m0s
      tlsHandshakeTimeout: 1h0m0s
    listen:
      address: 0.0.0.0:8080
      metricsAddress: 0.0.0.0:8083
    log:
      format: json
      level: info
    logs:
      maxPodsToRender: 10
    oidc:
      allowedAudiences:
      - argocd
      azure:
        graphAPIEndpointURL: https://example.com
        useWorkloadIdentity: true
        userGroupOverageClaim:
          cacheExpiration: 1h0m0s
          enabled: true
      cliClientID: argocd
      clientID: argocd
      clientSecretRef:
        key: oidc.clientSecret
        name: argocd-secret
      domainHint: contoso.onmicrosoft.com
      insecureSkipVerify: true
      issuerURL: https://example.com
      logoutURL: https://example.com
      name: Okta
      pkceAuthenticationEnabled: true
      refreshTokenThreshold: 1h0m0s
      requestedIDTokenClaims:
        groups:
          essential: true
          value: admin
          values:
          - frontend
      requestedScopes:
      - openid
      rootCA: |-
        -----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----
        MIIB...
        -----END CERTIFICATE-----
      skipAudienceCheckWhenTokenHasNoAudience: true
      userInfo:
        baseURL: https://example.com
        cacheExpiration: 1h0m0s
        groupsEnabled: true
        path: /userinfo
    profileEnabled: true
    proxyExtensionEnabled: true
    rbac:
      applicationFineGrainedInheritanceEnabled: true
      default: role:readonly
      matchMode: glob
      policyCSV: p, role:org-admin, applications, *, */*, allow
      policyOverlays:
      - csv: p, role:org-admin, applications, *, */*, allow
        name: extra
      scopes:
      - groups
    rootPath: /argo-cd
    staticAssetsPath: /shared/app
    statusBadge:
      enabled: true
      url: https://example.com
    syncReplaceAllowed: true
    tls:
      ciphers:
      - TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_128_GCM_SHA256
      maxVersion: "1.3"
      minVersion: "1.2"
    tlsEnabled: true
    ui:
      banner:
        content: Scheduled maintenance Sunday 02:00–04:00 UTC
        permanent: true
        position: top
        url: https://example.com
      cssURL: /shared/app/custom.css
      loginButtonText: Log in via SSO
    urls:
    - https://example.com
    users:
      anonymousEnabled: true
      passwordRegex: ^.{8,32}$
      sessionDuration: 1h0m0s
    webhook:
      maxPayloadSize: 10M
      parallelismLimit: 10
      refresh:
        jitter: 1h0m0s
        jitterThreshold: 3
        workers: 20
    xFrameOptions: sameorigin
```

## Expected ConfigMaps

### `argocd-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
data:
  admin.enabled: "true"
  application.allowedNodeLabels: app.kubernetes.io/name
  application.instanceLabelKey: app.kubernetes.io/instance
  application.links: |
    - description: Application metrics dashboard
      icon.class: fa-external-link
      if: app.status.sync.status == 'Synced'
      title: Open in Grafana
      url: https://grafana.example.com/d/argo/{{.app.metadata.name}}
  application.resourceTrackingMethod: annotation
  application.sync.impersonation.enabled: "true"
  application.sync.impersonation.enforced: "false"
  application.sync.requireOverridePrivilegeForRevisionSync: "true"
  cluster.inClusterEnabled: "true"
  commit.author.email: argo-cd@example.com
  commit.author.name: Argo CD
  dex.config: |
    connectors:
    - config:
        example: true
      id: github
      name: GitHub
      type: github
    example: true
    staticClients:
    - example: true
  exec.enabled: "true"
  exec.shells: bash
  extension.config: |
    extensions:
    - Backend:
        services:
        - cluster:
            name: metrics
            server: https://example.com
          headers:
          - name: Authorization
            value: $extension.metrics.token
          url: https://example.com
        transport:
          connectionTimeout: 1h0m0s
          idleConnectionTimeout: 1h0m0s
          keepAlive: 1h0m0s
          maxIdleConnections: 50
      Name: metrics
  ga.anonymizeusers: "true"
  ga.trackingid: UA-123456-1
  globalProjects: |
    - labelSelector:
        matchExpressions:
        - key: app.kubernetes.io/name
          operator: In
          values:
          - frontend
        matchLabels:
          app.kubernetes.io/part-of: argocd
      projectName: global
  helm.enable: "true"
  helm.valuesFileSchemes: https
  help.chatText: Chat with us on Slack
  help.chatUrl: https://example.com
  help.download.darwin-arm64: https://example.com/argocd-darwin-arm64
  installationID: prod-us-west-1
  jsonnet.enable: "true"
  kustomize.buildOptions: --enable-helm --load-restrictor LoadRestrictionsNone
  kustomize.buildOptions.v5.0.0: --enable-helm --load-restrictor LoadRestrictionsNone
  kustomize.enable: "true"
  kustomize.path.v5.0.0: /usr/local/bin/kustomize
  oidc.config: |
    allowedAudiences:
    - argocd
    azure:
      graphApiEndpoint: https://example.com
      useWorkloadIdentity: true
      userGroupOverageClaim:
        cacheExpiration: 1h0m0s
        enabled: true
    cliClientID: argocd
    clientID: argocd
    clientSecret: $oidc.clientSecret
    domainHint: contoso.onmicrosoft.com
    enablePKCEAuthentication: true
    issuer: https://example.com
    logoutURL: https://example.com
    name: Okta
    refreshTokenThreshold: 1h0m0s
    requestedIDTokenClaims:
      groups:
        essential: true
        value: admin
        values:
        - frontend
    requestedScopes:
    - openid
    rootCA: |-
      -----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----
      MIIB...
      -----END CERTIFICATE-----
    skipAudienceCheckWhenTokenHasNoAudience: true
    userInfo:
      baseURL: https://example.com
      cacheExpiration: 1h0m0s
      groupsEnabled: true
      path: /userinfo
  oidc.tls.insecure.skip.verify: "true"
  passwordPattern: ^.{8,32}$
  project.links: |
    - description: Application metrics dashboard
      icon.class: fa-external-link
      if: app.status.sync.status == 'Synced'
      title: Open in Grafana
      url: https://grafana.example.com/d/argo/{{.app.metadata.name}}
  resource.compareoptions: |
    ignoreAggregatedRoles: true
    ignoreDifferencesOnResourceUpdates: true
    ignoreResourceStatusField: crd
  resource.customLabels: app.kubernetes.io/name
  resource.customizations.actions.apps_Deployment: |
    definitions:
    - action.lua: |-
        obj.spec.replicas = 0
        return obj
      name: restart
    discovery.lua: |-
      actions = {}
      actions["restart"] = {}
      return actions
    mergeBuiltinActions: true
  resource.customizations.health.apps_Deployment: |-
    hs = {}
    hs.status = "Healthy"
    hs.message = "ok"
    return hs
  resource.customizations.ignoreDifferences.apps_Deployment: |
    jqPathExpressions:
    - .metadata.annotations."kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration"
    jsonPointers:
    - /status
    managedFieldsManagers:
    - kube-controller-manager
  resource.customizations.ignoreResourceUpdates.apps_Deployment: |
    jqPathExpressions:
    - .metadata.annotations."kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration"
    jsonPointers:
    - /status
    managedFieldsManagers:
    - kube-controller-manager
  resource.customizations.knownTypeFields.apps_Deployment: |
    - field: spec.template
      type: core/v1/PodSpec
  resource.customizations.useOpenLibs.apps_Deployment: "true"
  resource.excludeEventLabelKeys: kubectl.kubernetes.io/*
  resource.exclusions: |
    - apiGroups:
      - apps
      clusters:
      - https://kubernetes.default.svc
      kinds:
      - Deployment
  resource.ignoreResourceUpdatesEnabled: "true"
  resource.includeEventLabelKeys: app.kubernetes.io/*
  resource.inclusions: |
    - apiGroups:
      - apps
      clusters:
      - https://kubernetes.default.svc
      kinds:
      - Deployment
  resource.links: |
    - description: Application metrics dashboard
      icon.class: fa-external-link
      if: app.status.sync.status == 'Synced'
      title: Open in Grafana
      url: https://grafana.example.com/d/argo/{{.app.metadata.name}}
  resource.respectRBAC: strict
  resource.sensitive.mask.annotations: app.kubernetes.io/name
  server.maxPodLogsToRender: "10"
  server.rbac.disableApplicationFineGrainedRBACInheritance: "false"
  sourceHydrator.commitMessageTemplate: |-
    chore: hydrate {{.metadata.name}}

    {{range .spec.sources}}{{.repoURL}}@{{.targetRevision}}
    {{end}}
  sourceHydrator.readmeMessageTemplate: |-
    # {{.metadata.name}}

    Hydrated by Argo CD source hydrator.
  statusbadge.enabled: "true"
  statusbadge.url: https://example.com
  timeout.hard.reconciliation: 1h0m0s
  timeout.reconciliation: 1h0m0s
  timeout.reconciliation.jitter: 1h0m0s
  ui.bannercontent: Scheduled maintenance Sunday 02:00–04:00 UTC
  ui.bannerpermanent: "true"
  ui.bannerposition: top
  ui.bannerurl: https://example.com
  ui.cssurl: /shared/app/custom.css
  ui.loginButtonText: Log in via SSO
  url: https://example.com
  users.anonymous.enabled: "true"
  users.session.duration: 1h0m0s
  webhook.maxPayloadSizeMB: "10"
  webhook.refresh.jitter: 1h0m0s
  webhook.refresh.jitter.threshold: "3"
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

### `argocd-cmd-params-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
data:
  application.namespaces: team-*
  applicationsetcontroller.allowed.scm.providers: https://example.com
  applicationsetcontroller.concurrent.reconciliations.max: "10"
  applicationsetcontroller.dryrun: "true"
  applicationsetcontroller.enable.git.submodule: "true"
  applicationsetcontroller.enable.github.api.metrics: "true"
  applicationsetcontroller.enable.leader.election: "true"
  applicationsetcontroller.enable.new.git.file.globbing: "true"
  applicationsetcontroller.enable.policy.override: "true"
  applicationsetcontroller.enable.progressive.syncs: "true"
  applicationsetcontroller.enable.scm.providers: "true"
  applicationsetcontroller.enable.tokenref.strict.mode: "true"
  applicationsetcontroller.global.preserved.annotations: app.kubernetes.io/name
  applicationsetcontroller.global.preserved.labels: app.kubernetes.io/name
  applicationsetcontroller.grpc.enable.txt.service.config: "true"
  applicationsetcontroller.k8s.client.burst: "100"
  applicationsetcontroller.k8s.client.max.idle.connections: "50"
  applicationsetcontroller.k8s.client.qps: "50"
  applicationsetcontroller.k8s.tcp.idle.timeout: 1h0m0s
  applicationsetcontroller.k8s.tcp.keepalive: 1h0m0s
  applicationsetcontroller.k8s.tcp.timeout: 1h0m0s
  applicationsetcontroller.k8s.tls.handshake.timeout: 1h0m0s
  applicationsetcontroller.k8sclient.retry.base.backoff: "3600000"
  applicationsetcontroller.k8sclient.retry.max: "5"
  applicationsetcontroller.log.format: json
  applicationsetcontroller.log.level: info
  applicationsetcontroller.namespaces: team-*
  applicationsetcontroller.policy: sync
  applicationsetcontroller.profile.enabled: "true"
  applicationsetcontroller.repo.server.ca.cert.path: /etc/argocd/tls/ca.crt
  applicationsetcontroller.repo.server.client.cert.key.path: /etc/argocd/tls/tls.key
  applicationsetcontroller.repo.server.client.cert.path: /etc/argocd/tls/tls.crt
  applicationsetcontroller.requeue.after: 1h0m0s
  applicationsetcontroller.scm.root.ca.path: /etc/argocd/tls/ca.crt
  applicationsetcontroller.status.max.resources.count: "100"
  applicationsetcontroller.webhook.parallelism.limit: "10"
  commit.server: argocd-commit-server:8086
  commitserver.grpc.enable.txt.service.config: "true"
  commitserver.listen.address: argocd-commit-server:8086
  commitserver.log.format: json
  commitserver.log.level: info
  commitserver.metrics.listen.address: 0.0.0.0:8083
  controller.app.state.cache.expiration: 1h0m0s
  controller.cluster.cache.batch.events.processing: "true"
  controller.cluster.cache.events.processing.interval: 1h0m0s
  controller.default.cache.expiration: 1h0m0s
  controller.diff.server.side: "true"
  controller.grpc.enable.txt.service.config: "true"
  controller.hydration.processors: "20"
  controller.ignore.normalizer.jq.timeout: 1h0m0s
  controller.k8s.client.burst: "100"
  controller.k8s.client.max.idle.connections: "50"
  controller.k8s.client.qps: "50"
  controller.k8s.tcp.idle.timeout: 1h0m0s
  controller.k8s.tcp.keepalive: 1h0m0s
  controller.k8s.tcp.timeout: 1h0m0s
  controller.k8s.tls.handshake.timeout: 1h0m0s
  controller.k8sclient.retry.base.backoff: "3600000"
  controller.k8sclient.retry.max: "5"
  controller.kubectl.parallelism.limit: "10"
  controller.log.format: json
  controller.log.level: info
  controller.metrics.application.conditions: Synced
  controller.metrics.application.labels: app.kubernetes.io/name
  controller.metrics.cache.expiration: 1h0m0s
  controller.metrics.cluster.labels: app.kubernetes.io/name
  controller.operation.processors: "20"
  controller.profile.enabled: "true"
  controller.repo.error.grace.period.seconds: "3600"
  controller.repo.server.ca.cert.path: /etc/argocd/tls/ca.crt
  controller.repo.server.client.cert.key.path: /etc/argocd/tls/tls.key
  controller.repo.server.client.cert.path: /etc/argocd/tls/tls.crt
  controller.repo.server.plaintext: "false"
  controller.repo.server.strict.tls: "false"
  controller.repo.server.timeout.seconds: "3600"
  controller.resource.health.persist: "true"
  controller.self.heal.backoff.cap.seconds: "3600"
  controller.self.heal.backoff.cooldown.seconds: "3600"
  controller.self.heal.backoff.factor: "2"
  controller.self.heal.backoff.timeout.seconds: "3600"
  controller.self.heal.timeout.seconds: "3600"
  controller.sharding.algorithm: legacy
  controller.status.processors: "20"
  controller.sync.timeout.seconds: "3600"
  controller.sync.wave.delay.seconds: "3600"
  dexserver.connector.failure.continue: "true"
  dexserver.disable.tls: "false"
  dexserver.log.format: json
  dexserver.log.level: info
  hydrator.enabled: "true"
  log.format.timestamp: RFC3339
  notificationscontroller.log.format: json
  notificationscontroller.log.level: info
  notificationscontroller.processors.count: "20"
  notificationscontroller.repo.server.ca.cert.path: /etc/argocd/tls/ca.crt
  notificationscontroller.repo.server.client.cert.key.path: /etc/argocd/tls/tls.key
  notificationscontroller.repo.server.client.cert.path: /etc/argocd/tls/tls.crt
  notificationscontroller.repo.server.plaintext: "false"
  notificationscontroller.selfservice.enabled: "true"
  otlp.address: otel-collector:4317
  otlp.attrs: service.name:argocd-server
  otlp.headers: Authorization=Bearer token
  otlp.insecure: "false"
  otlp.sample.ratio: "0.5"
  redis.compression: gzip
  redis.db: "0"
  redis.key.prefix: argocd
  redis.sentinel.hosts: redis-sentinel:26379
  redis.sentinel.master: mymaster
  redis.server: argocd-redis:6379
  repo.server: argocd-repo-server:8081
  reposerver.allow.oob.symlinks: "true"
  reposerver.client.ca.path: /etc/argocd/tls/ca.crt
  reposerver.default.cache.expiration: 1h0m0s
  reposerver.disable.helm.manifest.max.extracted.size: "false"
  reposerver.disable.oci.manifest.max.extracted.size: "false"
  reposerver.disable.tls: "false"
  reposerver.enable.builtin.git.config: "true"
  reposerver.enable.git.submodule: "true"
  reposerver.git.lsremote.parallelism.limit: "10"
  reposerver.git.request.timeout: 1h0m0s
  reposerver.grpc.enable.txt.service.config: "true"
  reposerver.grpc.max.size: "10"
  reposerver.helm.manifest.max.extracted.size: 10M
  reposerver.helm.user.agent: argocd-repo-server
  reposerver.include.hidden.directories: "true"
  reposerver.listen.address: argocd-repo-server:8081
  reposerver.log.format: json
  reposerver.log.level: info
  reposerver.max.combined.directory.manifests.size: 10M
  reposerver.metrics.listen.address: 0.0.0.0:8083
  reposerver.oci.layer.media.types: application/vnd.oci.image.layer.v1.tar+gzip
  reposerver.oci.manifest.max.extracted.size: 10M
  reposerver.parallelism.limit: "10"
  reposerver.plugin.tar.exclusions: .git/*
  reposerver.plugin.use.manifest.generate.paths: "true"
  reposerver.profile.enabled: "true"
  reposerver.repo.cache.expiration: 1h0m0s
  reposerver.revision.cache.lock.timeout: 1h0m0s
  reposerver.streamed.manifest.max.extracted.size: 10M
  reposerver.streamed.manifest.max.tar.size: 10M
  reposerver.tls.ciphers: TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_128_GCM_SHA256
  reposerver.tls.maxversion: "1.3"
  reposerver.tls.minversion: "1.2"
  server.api.content.types: application/json
  server.app.state.cache.expiration: 1h0m0s
  server.basehref: /argo-cd
  server.connection.status.cache.expiration: 1h0m0s
  server.content.security.policy: frame-ancestors 'self'; object-src 'none'
  server.default.cache.expiration: 1h0m0s
  server.dex.server: argocd-dex-server:5556
  server.dex.server.plaintext: "false"
  server.dex.server.strict.tls: "false"
  server.disable.auth: "false"
  server.enable.gzip: "true"
  server.enable.proxy.extension: "true"
  server.glob.cache.size: "1000"
  server.grpc.enable.txt.service.config: "true"
  server.http.cookie.maxnumber: "10"
  server.insecure: "false"
  server.k8s.client.burst: "100"
  server.k8s.client.max.idle.connections: "50"
  server.k8s.client.qps: "50"
  server.k8s.tcp.idle.timeout: 1h0m0s
  server.k8s.tcp.keepalive: 1h0m0s
  server.k8s.tcp.timeout: 1h0m0s
  server.k8s.tls.handshake.timeout: 1h0m0s
  server.k8sclient.retry.base.backoff: "3600000"
  server.k8sclient.retry.max: "5"
  server.listen.address: 0.0.0.0:8080
  server.log.format: json
  server.log.level: info
  server.metrics.listen.address: 0.0.0.0:8083
  server.oidc.cache.expiration: 1h0m0s
  server.profile.enabled: "true"
  server.repo.server.ca.cert.path: /etc/argocd/tls/ca.crt
  server.repo.server.client.cert.key.path: /etc/argocd/tls/tls.key
  server.repo.server.client.cert.path: /etc/argocd/tls/tls.crt
  server.repo.server.plaintext: "false"
  server.repo.server.strict.tls: "false"
  server.repo.server.timeout.seconds: "3600"
  server.rootpath: /argo-cd
  server.staticassets: /shared/app
  server.sync.replace.allowed: "true"
  server.tls.ciphers: TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_128_GCM_SHA256
  server.tls.maxversion: "1.3"
  server.tls.minversion: "1.2"
  server.webhook.parallelism.limit: "10"
  server.webhook.refresh.workers: "20"
  server.x.frame.options: sameorigin
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cmd-params-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

### `argocd-rbac-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
data:
  policy.csv: p, role:org-admin, applications, *, */*, allow
  policy.default: role:readonly
  policy.extra.csv: p, role:org-admin, applications, *, */*, allow
  policy.matchMode: glob
  scopes: '- groups'
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-rbac-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

## Diagnostics

### `diagnostics.yaml`

```yaml
- direction: cr->cm
  key: argocd-cm
  message: no source ConfigMap provided; labels/annotations cannot be preserved
  severity: warn
- direction: cr->cm
  key: argocd-cmd-params-cm
  message: no source ConfigMap provided; labels/annotations cannot be preserved
  severity: warn
- direction: cr->cm
  key: argocd-rbac-cm
  message: no source ConfigMap provided; labels/annotations cannot be preserved
  severity: warn
- direction: cm->cr
  key: controller.repo.server.ca.cert.path
  message: both controller.repo.server.* and server.repo.server.* present with same
    value; collapsed to single CR field
  severity: warn
- direction: cr->cm
  key: controller.repo.server.ca.cert.path
  message: writing same value to controller.repo.server.* and server.repo.server.*
    keys
  severity: warn
- direction: cr->cm
  key: controller.repo.server.ca.cert.path
  message: writing same value to controller.repo.server.* and server.repo.server.*
    keys
  severity: warn
```
